name: Lung compliance
description: Lung (respiratory system) compliance — volume change per unit pressure, in mL/cmH2O (static and dynamic).

en.name: Lung compliance
en.shortDescription: Lung (respiratory system) compliance — volume change per unit pressure, in mL/cmH2O (static and dynamic).
en.longDescription:
## Definition & Clinical Context

Lung (respiratory system) compliance is a measure of how easily the lungs distend — the change in lung volume per unit change in airway pressure. A low compliance means stiff lungs (e.g. in ARDS or fibrosis). In source data it is a single numeric value per patient-timestamp, derived by the ventilator or pulmonary-function equipment. It is recorded in intensive care and anaesthesia for ventilated patients. It is reported in millilitres per centimetre of water (mL/cmH2O).

## Included Concepts

The set lists the SNOMED and LOINC concepts for lung compliance, grouped by how it is measured.

### Generic lung compliance (default)

- *4298264 / 3863008 — Lung compliance (SNOMED)*: the general concept; the default when static vs dynamic is not specified.
- *21490581 / 60826-5 — Lung compliance (LOINC)*.

### Static compliance

Measured under no-flow conditions (e.g. during an inspiratory hold); reflects the elastic properties of the lung.

- *4090322 / 251886005 — Static lung compliance (SNOMED)*.
- *21490583 / 60828-1 — Compliance.static Lung (LOINC)*.

### Dynamic compliance

Measured during active breathing (with flow); influenced by both elastic and airway-resistance properties.

- *4090654 / 251885009 — Dynamic compliance (SNOMED)*.
- *4353624 / 250823005 — Total dynamic compliance (SNOMED)*.
- *21490582 / 60827-3 — Dynamic lung compliance (LOINC)*.

**Note on units**: reported in **mL/cmH2O** (`720866 / ml/cm [H2O] — milliliter per centimeter of water`, UCUM), the recommended unit.

## Excluded Concepts

- *4090655 / 251888006 — Specific compliance (lung) (SNOMED)*: specific compliance is lung compliance normalised to lung volume, so it is expressed per cmH2O (not mL/cmH2O) and is not inter-convertible with the concepts above; it is therefore not part of this unit-homogeneous set.

## Mapping Notes

- **Default concept** when the source records a lung/respiratory-system compliance without specifying static vs dynamic: *4298264 / 3863008 — Lung compliance*.
- **Static vs dynamic**: map to a static concept only when the value comes from a no-flow (inspiratory-hold) measurement, and to a dynamic concept when it is measured during active breathing. If not specified, use the generic concept.
- **Specific compliance** (normalised to lung volume, different unit) is not part of this set.

fr.name: Compliance pulmonaire
fr.shortDescription: Compliance pulmonaire (système respiratoire) — variation de volume par unité de pression, en mL/cmH2O (statique et dynamique).

versions.author: Boris Delange
versions.message: Describe lung compliance; register mL/cmH2O recommended unit. Removed Specific compliance (4090655) — normalised to lung volume, a different (per-cmH2O) unit not inter-convertible with mL/cmH2O. Resolves to 7.
